channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Idéal pour booster votre PC portable, cet adaptateur USB-C Ethernet TP-Link 2,5 Gb/s chute à -56 %
item.description: Votre machine récente fait l'impasse sur le port RJ45 ? L'adaptateur TP-Link LAN USB C 2,5 G règle la question chez Amazon, où son prix s'écroule de 29,55 euros à seulement 12,99 euros.

item.title: Google is spending $50 million on 'growing the next generation of American workers' — but at $166 per worker, surely it's not going to get very far?
item.description: The search engine giant has committed to spending at least $50 million on training that it says will impact as many as 300,000 workers across America.

item.title: On a dégoté l’écran connecté Xiaomi idéal pour une petite pièce à prix cassé
item.description: Besoin d'un téléviseur d'appoint fonctionnel sans casser votre tirelire ? La compacte Xiaomi TV A 32 s'affiche à seulement 99,66 euros chez Aliexpress grâce à un code promotionnel. C'est l'un des moyens les plus abordables pour profiter de l'expérience Google TV dans votre chambre ou votre cuisine.

item.title: Fox wants to take over your TV — and the tech inside it
item.description: Fox is about to take over the TVs in more than 100 million homes worldwide. On Monday, Fox announced that it's acquiring Roku, the streaming middleman that serves as a portal for viewers to hop into services like Netflix, Disney Plus, Hulu, and more. The $22 billion deal may not change Roku's familiar purple interface, […]

item.title: Housing market affordability is so stretched that this $23B builder is shelling out $55K incentives per home
item.description: Lennar spent an average of 12.9% of the final sales price on sales incentives in Q2 2026—down from 14.1% last quarter. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: TCL A65K Soundbar Review: Small Size, Big Sound
item.description: Don’t be fooled by the compact size of this soundbar. It’s a solid option for smaller TVs or spaces without having to sacrifice sound quality.

item.title: Ce PC coûte 86 200 € : voici ce qu’il contient
item.description: Asus vend une tour de bureau avec une puce IA Nvidia GB300 et 748 Go de mémoire. Le prix de départ : 99 999 dollars, soit environ 86 200 euros.

item.title: Satya Nadella warns that AI could hollow out entire industries, echoing the damage done by globalization
item.description: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella published a sweeping essay on Sunday laying out what he describes as the defining economic challenge of the AI era: the risk that a handful of frontier models will absorb the expertise of entire industries and commoditize it, leaving businesses stripped of their competitive moats."The last thing any of us want is a world where every company across every sector is ceding value to a few models that eat everything they see," Nadella wrote in the piece, titled "A frontier without an ecosystem is not stable," which he posted on X. "If all the value is accrued by only a f...

item.title: Chrome débranche uBlock Origin le 30 juin : la dernière astuce vient de disparaître
item.description: Le 30 juin, Chrome 150 va effacer la dernière astuce qui maintenait uBlock Origin en vie. Si tu bloques les pubs sur le navigateur de Google, c'est la fin de la récré.

item.title: Amazon’s Smart Thermostat is on sale for just $58
item.description: If your electricity bill climbs every summer, a smart thermostat could help keep cooling costs in check. The Amazon Smart Thermostat is an excellent option for its price, especially today. It’s down to just $57.99 at Amazon as a part of Amazon’s early Prime Day sale, which is the best price we’ve seen since Black […]

item.title: When deep research isn't enough for your business: Sakana AI launches 'ultra deep research' agent for 100+ page reports in 8 hours
item.description: Tokyo-based AI startup Sakana AI has officially launched its first commercial product, Sakana Marlin. Billed as a "Virtual CSO" (Chief Strategy Officer), Marlin is an autonomous, B2B research agent that deliberately abandons the instantaneous text generation of modern chatbots in favor of deep, long-horizon reasoning. What sets Marlin apart from the current ecosystem of AI tools is its temporal scale: instead of returning an answer in seconds, it runs continuous, self-governing reasoning loops for up to eight hours at a time to deliver deeply researched, well cited, 100-page strategy reports a...

item.title: Stanford grads booed Google CEO Sundar Pichai’s commencement speech—but not for the reason you think
item.description: Google’s ongoing Project Nimbus deal with Israel led to an icy reception for Pichai. At graduation ceremonies in 2026, the mere mention of artificial intelligence is enough to garner boos from the crowd.

item.title: Tout le monde parle d’un monstre IA français nommé « Le Chaton Fat » : il n’existe pas, et les Américains adorent s’en moquer
item.description: Tout le monde parle d’un nouveau monstre de Mistral AI appelé « Le Chaton Fat ». Sauf qu’il n’existe pas : c’est une vaste blague de la communauté IA, et la France en prend pour son grade.

item.title: Could data center growth halt by 2030? Report claims power demands may halt AI advances within the next few years
item.description: Gartner report indicates that the AI bottleneck might not be a silicon-based limit, but actual access to power by 2030.

item.title: How to watch Saudi Arabia vs Uruguay: Free Streams & TV Channels for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Saudi Arabia vs Uruguay for free online and from anywhere as Group H action intensifies at Miami Stadium in the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: The Breville Barista Express falls to a record-low price ahead of Prime Day, so it might finally be the time I upgrade my home coffee maker
item.description: I've been looking for an upgrade to my home coffee machine for a while, and now that the Breville Barista Express is back to its lowest-ever price ahead of Prime Day, I think I might have found what I'm looking for.

item.title: All the news about Anthropic’s new AI fight with the White House
item.description: Anthropic was already navigating one dispute with the government in its standoff with the Pentagon, and then came an order on June 12th to block off foreign access to its most recently released AI models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5. When they launched on June 9th, Anthropic said “Fable 5’s capabilities exceed those of any […]

item.title: How to watch World Cup on YouTube (it's free)
item.description: How to watch World Cup on YouTube (it's free), with all 104 games of the 2026 tournament free-to-air courtesy of Brazilian network CazéTV.

item.title: More than 2,000 Starbucks stores are closing early on June 22 after a promotion sparked national outrage
item.description: Starbucks Korea will shut every location early for mandatory training after a marketing campaign sparked national outrage and a police investigation. A botched marketing campaign by Starbucks’ South Korean operation that’s resulted in boycotts, an investigation, a fired executive, and a public apology continues as all 2,000-plus locations nationwide will close early on June 22 for mandatory history and social sensitivity training....

item.title: Porn company can sue Meta for torrenting its adult films for AI training, judge rules
item.description: Strike 3 Holdings and Counterlife Media can now sue Meta for alleged copyright infringement, a judge ruled. Meta reportedly used the films to train AI.

item.title: Anthropic hit with lawsuit over its Claude Max usage limits
item.description: Anthropic is being sued over Claude Max usage limits

item.title: The best early Amazon Prime Day deals so far
item.description: Amazon’s earlier-than-usual Prime Day doesn’t begin until June 23rd, but there are several even earlier deals on must-have products that you can check out right now. To name some examples, Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 are selling at their cheapest-ever price. Also, you can grab Ring’s latest battery-powered doorbell for $60 off and it includes a […]

item.title: After FIFA covered up Levis logo for the World Cup, the company changed its Instagram profile picture
item.description: Levi's had to cover up its logo at Levi's Stadium for the World Cup. Now, it's covering its logo on Instagram too.

item.title: Meta’s new ‘AI Mode’ on Facebook pulls from public info across its platforms
item.description: Meta announced Monday that it's rolling out a wave of new AI features on Facebook, the latest sign of the company's effort to catch up in the AI race and keep users more engaged on the platform.

item.title: SpaceX is public: Everything you need to know post-IPO
item.description: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

item.title: What's the difference between Dolby Cinema and IMAX?
item.description: It all comes down to big sound and big pictures.
